data.body:
User feedback from /taxonomize review (2026-04-16): knots-architecture-v4.md is the canonical architecture deep-dive (964 lines, referenced from docs/README.md) but contains legacy state names that no longer exist in code: 'idea', 'work_item', 'implementing', 'implemented', 'reviewing', 'rejected', 'refining', 'approved'. Current canonical states are in TAXONOMY.md and src/domain/state.rs.

Proposal:
- Author knots-architecture-v5.md capturing the current architecture and state vocabulary (reference TAXONOMY.md rather than re-duplicating).
- Cross-reference from docs/README.md and ARCHITECTURE.md.
- Once v5 lands, mark v4 as historical (prepend a banner pointing readers at v5) or delete it — whichever the team prefers at ship time.

Acceptance:
- knots-architecture-v5.md exists at repo root.
- Every state name mentioned in v5 exists in src/domain/state.rs (or is generated from loom; see sibling knot on loom-generated state vocabulary).
- docs/README.md and ARCHITECTURE.md point at v5.
data.title: Write knots-architecture-v5.md replacing v4 with current design
